title: Easy
why_this_song: Easy by Lionel Richie (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm easy like Sunday mornin', yeah
That's why I'm easy, so easy
Whoa, that's why I'm easy, so easy
Yes, I'm easy like Sunday mornin'

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "easy" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "easy" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "mornin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "mornin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I've paid my dues to make it
Now play it right here for me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You see I begged, stole and I borrowed
That's why I'm easy, so easy

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Easy" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Easy" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Easy" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Easy", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Easy" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Easy" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
